summary: Independent R2 QA accepts commit 3fcdb724f630f6cf498df26cc3f65729fe029306. The prior P1 locale canonicalization defect is fixed: en and en-* resolve to en-US, zh and zh-* resolve to zh-CN, en-GB before zh-Hans resolves to en-US, and zh-TW, zh-HK, and zh-Hans-HK resolve to zh-CN. Persisted regional preferences migrate to the canonical supported preference set, localStorage getItem/setItem failures no longer block Web shell boot, and the repair remains client-only with no sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, map-renderer, Electron IPC/preload, dependency, tool, CI, ADR, or gate/status boundary expansion.

tests_run.result: Worktree was clean at feat/m7-i18n-foundation before this QA R2 handoff was written.
HEAD is 88a3c73b route M7 i18n R2 QA review; R2 source commit under review is 3fcdb724 fix(ui): canonicalize locale families for M7 i18n; commits after 3fcdb724 are process route/status updates only.

R2 source commit modifies apps/web/src/shell/i18n-platform.ts, apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.test.tsx, packages/ui/src/i18n.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx, and the writer R2 handoff.
Reviewed the actual R2 repair diff. Changes are limited to allowed Web/UI/test/process paths.

Vitest passed: 1 file, 13 tests. R2 coverage includes en, en-GB, zh-Hans, zh-TW, zh-HK, zh-Hans-HK, en-GB-before-zh-Hans ordering, localized reason display, and read-model/hash immutability.

decisions.decision: Accept the R2 fix for the prior P1 finding. The supported locale families now canonicalize as required: en/en-* -> en-US and zh/zh-* -> zh-CN, including the exact edge cases requested in QA R1 and the R2 route.

Accept persisted preference migration and localStorage failure handling. Regional persisted values are rewritten to supported canonical preferences, getItem failure falls back to system, and setItem failure is swallowed so boot and language switching are not blocked by storage.

Accept the boundary: the repair remains in @monsoon/ui, apps/web shell code, and focused tests. It does not change authoritative simulation state, command history, save data, AI/player command behavior, map authority, Electron IPC/preload, or dependency manifests.

No Human Gate is required for this R2 repair because it implements the already accepted current supported surface of system, en-US, and zh-CN. Future Traditional Chinese, regional Chinese, or additional locale support would need separate task/Human Gate treatment.

risks.summary: All zh-* tags intentionally map to zh-CN for the current supported locale surface. This must not be interpreted as completed Traditional Chinese or region-specific Chinese support.
risks.mitigation: Keep future zh-Hant, zh-TW, zh-HK, or additional locale support behind a separate approved task or Human Gate.

risks.summary: This task is the i18n foundation. Full player-mode text cleanup, no-debug-string coverage, and complete no-bare-key assertions remain assigned to downstream M7 UI tasks.
risks.mitigation: Keep M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001, M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001, M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001, M7-APPOINTMENT-FLOW-QUALITY-001, M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001, M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001, and M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 responsible for final player-mode UI/localization coverage.

requested_action: Lead may accept and integrate M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 after R2 QA acceptance, preserving downstream responsibility for full player-mode UI/localization cleanup.
